DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. EXPARTE MOTION TO CONT. TRIAL DATE OF 1-12-94 TO 2-14-94 WITH A SETTLEMENT CONF. OF 2-7-94 GRANTED. BOTH ATTYS. PRESENT & STIP TO CONT. DEF. COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER FOR FILING.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
ORDER GRANTING CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE TRIAL DATE CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 14, 1994. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO BE HELD ON FEBRUARY 7, 1994.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO FEB-14-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER ORDER AT TRIAL

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/LEILA CLARK-RIDDELL AS COUNSEL. PARTIES STIP. TO STRIKE AT ISSUE MEMORANDUM & PLACE DEF. ON PERIOD OF PROBATION UNDER FOLLOWING CONDI- TIONS - CITY INSPECTOR TO INSPECT DEFS. DWELLING TO DETER- MINE WHETHER ROACH INFESTATION IS DUE TO HER "POOR HOUSE- KEEPING" - DEF. AGREES TO MONTHLY INSPECTIONS FOR PERIOD OF 6 MONTHS BY MICHELLE EVANS UPON 48HRS. NOTICE TO DEF. - ALL BACK RENT TO BE PD. IN FULL BY 2-11-94 - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS UPTO THE DATE OF THIS STIP. - UPON COMPLETING 6 MO PROB. PERIOD, PL. WILL FILE DISM. & PLACE DEF. ON WAITING LIST FOR NEW CARPETS & PAINT - IF DEF FAILS PROB. PERIOD, PL. TO FILE NEW AT ISSUE MEMO NO SOONER THAN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTIFYING THE DEF. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, AT ISSUE MEMO WITHDRAWN - DEPT 1
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
